title: Ridgeline Rovers FC crest: clean up a phone-shot patch photo, vectorize the emblem, and build a factory-ready embroidery/patch vector package
one_line_ask: Clean up the club's phone photo of a stitched sample crest, vectorize the emblem into razor-sharp scalable art at 3-6 inch patch size, reduce it to flat spot-color separations, and hand back a factory-ready SVG plus exported vector masters and a stitch-color reference gathered into a shared review folder.

issues: Visible phone interface framing the patch (acceptable for a source asset, but not ideal for a clean reference)
Minor glare/reflection on phone screen edges
Patch is not perfectly centered in the phone screen (slightly off, but still clearly the main focus)
Some background clutter (scratches on table), but not severe
Mild keystone/perspective distortion present (acceptable per brief)
Slight green color cast from wooden table ambient light (acceptable per brief)
Camera UI overlay visible on right edge (acceptable as phone photo context)
Very minor soft focus at patch edges (acceptable per brief)
Thread texture visible but satin stitch definition slightly soft in lower banner area
panel.text_found: RRFC EST. 2014 PHOTO VIDEO PANK VOR RIIE AU STAN Box

assets.name: ridgeline_crest.ai
assets.note: Client-provided .ai template; represented here as an authored text proxy (binary Adobe format not synthesizable).
